name: pysusie
summary: Pure-Python port of the R/CRAN package susieR — Sum of Single Effects (SuSiE) regression for Bayesian variable selection and genetic fine-mapping.
license:
BSD 3-Clause License
        
        This Python port (py-susie / pysusie) is released under the same
        BSD 3-Clause license as the original R/CRAN package susieR
        (https://github.com/stephenslab/susieR), which implements the
        "Sum of Single Effects" (SuSiE) regression model described in
        Wang, Sarkar, Carbonetto & Stephens, J. R. Stat. Soc. B (2020) 82:1273-1300
        and Zou, Carbonetto, Wang & Stephens, PLoS Genetics (2022) 18:e1010299.
